expectations.text: States that implementation uses the tdd skill with an explicit red-green-refactor loop.
expectations.evidence: Phase 5 section explicitly says implementation is required with tdd skill and explicit red-green-refactor loop.

expectations.text: States that code-simplifier is launched as a subagent for refactoring opportunities.
expectations.evidence: Phase 6 section names code-simplifier as required separate subagent and describes its refactoring purpose.

expectations.text: States that quality review is performed by an independent code-reviewer subagent.
expectations.evidence: Phase 6 and sequence sections explicitly require independent code-reviewer subagent(s) with reviewer focus areas.

expectations.text: Keeps recommendations calibrated to medium-sized feature work instead of escalating unnecessarily.
expectations.evidence: Response consistently calibrates to Standard track medium feature execution and avoids unnecessary escalation.
